overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk apartment from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player interacts with a console device, surveys the high-tech living space, gazes out at a futuristic cityscape through large windows, and exits the apartment through a dim hallway into an elevator. Features neon lighting, holographic displays, and dystopian urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment living room with neon accents

events.description: hand reaches toward and touches the purple console device on the table
hand interacts with device controls, pressing buttons on the interface
hand moves to pick up a small object from the table surface

agents.ego_description: reaching toward and manipulating a futuristic console device, then picking up an item from the coffee table

entered.detail: futuristic black and purple gaming console with glowing pink accents on the coffee table
large curved display mounted on the wall showing abstract colorful patterns
modern gray couch with decorative pillows against the right wall
low table with magazines and an ashtray in front of the sofa
traditional illuminated paper lantern hanging near the kitchen entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment living room focused on a high-tech purple console device. The player interacts with the device and items on the coffee table while neon lights and a large curved monitor illuminate the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment kitchen and office nook with city view

events.description: moving from living room into kitchen area with modern appliances
approaching desk by large windows revealing futuristic cityscape outside

agents.ego_description: walking through the kitchen area toward a desk by the window to observe the city view

entered.detail: modern kitchen counter with bottles and appliances
tall refrigerator with digital display interface
L-shaped desk with computer setup and various items
ergonomic office chair in front of the computer desk
floor-to-ceiling windows with green frames overlooking the city
futuristic urban landscape with tall buildings and industrial structures visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the living room through a modern kitchen to a desk area by large windows. Natural light floods in revealing a detailed futuristic cityscape outside with towering industrial buildings, while the interior features a computer workstation and kitchen appliances.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room transitioning to apartment exit

events.description: turning away from the window to move back through the apartment
exiting the apartment into the building hallway

agents.ego_description: turning away from the window and walking back through the living room toward the apartment exit

entered.detail: large poster with 'RIOT' text and stylized graphics on the wall above the sofa
metal apartment exit door with digital lock interface
tall rectangular floor lamp with white shade

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the city view and moves back through the living room, passing the gray sofa with the 'RIOT' poster above it, and approaches the apartment exit door. The lighting shifts to warmer artificial tones as the player prepares to leave.

events.description: entering dimly lit apartment building hallway with graffiti
entering the elevator at the end of the hallway
pressing button on elevator control panel to select floor

agents.ego_description: walking down the hallway and entering an elevator, then interacting with the digital control panel

entered.detail: narrow corridor with worn walls and overhead lighting
wall with spray paint graffiti and markings
illuminated vending machine against the hallway wall
metal elevator cabin with ribbed flooring and handrails
digital interface showing floor selection options

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a grimy apartment building hallway with graffiti-covered walls and a vending machine. The player walks to the end of the hall and enters a sleek metal elevator, interacting with the digital control panel as the doors close.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a high-tech apartment into the grimy, industrial corridors of a futuristic building. It begins in a dimly lit living room focused on a purple console and a curved monitor, before gliding through a modern kitchen toward a workstation bathed in natural light from large windows overlooking a towering cityscape. The camera then turns away from the urban vista and retreats through the living area, passing a gray sofa and a RIOT poster as the lighting shifts toward warmer artificial tones. Finally, the scene expands into a dingy hallway marked by graffiti and a vending machine, ending as the camera enters a sleek metal elevator and interacts with the digital control panel before the doors close.
